query: SELECT li.description, li.quantity, li.unitPrice FROM invoiceLineItems li WHERE li.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND UPPER(li.description) IN ('FARINE THREE STARS NON BLANCHIE AA40 - 20 KG', 'SUCRE FIN - REDPATH - 20 KG', 'GRAINE DE SÉSAME INDIEN 99.98% PUR - 50 LBS - 22.68 KG', 'FARINE MALT NO 05505 - 20 KG', 'LEVURE FRAÎCHE - LALLEMAND 20 X 2 LBS - 18.14 KG', 'HUILE DE CANOLA LA PERLA 16 LITRES') LIMIT 12;
